items.title: Computational Humor with Multimodal LLMs: Methods, Datasets, Evaluation, and Challenges
items.summary: Multimodal humor in memes, cartoons, and comics remains difficult for AI systems because intended meaning depends on non-literal mechanisms, shared cultural knowledge, and communicative intent rather than literal scene description. This survey focuses on visual humor understandi…

items.title: Delineate Anything v2: A Global Foundation Model for Field Delineation
items.summary: Accurate agricultural field boundary delineation at large scale is a foundational task for food security, supply chain transparency, and carbon accounting. While vision foundation models like SAM show remarkable zero-shot capabilities, they frequently fail in geospatial domains …
